name: @wsmy/antora-markdown-exporter
description: Antora Assembler based Markdown exporter with semantic IR and multi-flavor rendering

scripts.lint: biome check bin src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.fix: biome check --write bin src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.format: biome format --write bin src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.check: biome check bin src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts && vitest run --coverage
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run check
